comments: pr ad-sum; typical return date over last 6 yrs, 4 days later than 2025, but also mid-May record 2021.  All records (unnecessarily) hidden in BirdTrack
In the garden on the feeder.
Saw clearly. ID'd earlier by others. Took off before I could photograph.
Drake.  Found earlier in the day. Was with 4 Eurasian Wigeon on the new lagoon at high tide then flew onto the river mouth. Photographed.
Amongst a large flock of Common Ringed Plover alongside Dunlin and Sanderling.
Known birds. All singing around Seafield lagoons and had brief views of all 3. Audio recorded and photographed.
